playbook.intent: Random side-projects → a yearly rotation of 4–6 small bets compounding into ramen profitability.
playbook.scope: Solo indie hacker runs a documented quarterly rotation that ships 4 to 6 small products per year, keeps the 2 to 3 with traction, sunsets the rest, and compounds the survivors into a portfolio that hits ramen profitability.

success-criteria.criterion: Documented portfolio scorecard with kill/keep thresholds
Annual P&L reconciles ≥80% of revenue to ≤2 winners

stage.name: Backlog
stage.intent: A live idea-pool feeds the rotation faster than ideas die.

tasks.task: Maintain an idea inbox tagged by JTBD and audience-fit
Score new entries weekly using a lightweight RICE
Cull the bottom quartile every month

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥10 ideas sit in the inbox with scores.

stage.name: Rotation
stage.intent: One bet per quarter enters build; one exits to keep / kill.

tasks.task: Lock the bet for the quarter — no scope-swap mid-cycle
Define the kill criteria up front
Schedule a 7-day spike to confirm feasibility

outputs.output: Kill criteria attached to the brief

stage.decision-gate: Advance if spike confirms feasibility within the quarter's effort budget.

stage.name: Ship
stage.intent: Bet reaches MVP launch within the quarter.

tasks.task: Run the MVP launch checklist (positioning, pricing, payment)
Open a Stripe path even for free-tier products

stage.decision-gate: Advance if MVP launches within the quarter; else move bet to 'aborted' with notes.

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Each quarter, survivors get sustained; losers get sunsetted.

tasks.task: Move survivors to maintain mode; sunset the rest
Schedule sunset comms and asset harvest

stage.decision-gate: Each product: keep if revenue OR active-user metric trends up; sunset if neither.

stage.name: Compound
stage.intent: Surviving products share content, audience, and automation.

tasks.task: Automate operational toil with shared scripts

stage.decision-gate: Advance into the next rotation when surviving products run on <1 day/wk of toil.

extra.value: [Single-bet maximalism — this is portfolio strategy, Hiring or outsourcing — pure solo throughput, Building one large product — explicit 'tiny bets' frame]
[At least one shipped product (alive or sunsetted) as baseline, A simple metrics dashboard across all live products]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation --format md, agent: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation --format context, json: faion get-content multi-product-portfolio-rotation --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
